description_long: This is a cylindrical lotion bottle with a smooth, white exterior and a tall, straight-sided profile. The bottle features a screw-on cap that is slightly wider than the body, providing a secure closure. On the front, the brand name 'NEOSTRATA' is printed vertically in bold, dark letters, accompanied by an orange label section with the word 'DEFEND' and additional product details in smaller text below. The rest of the bottle is mostly plain, with minimal graphics and a clean, clinical appearance. The material appears to be lightweight plastic, typical for personal care products, and the bottle is likely filled with a liquid or cream. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for use in urban environments such as bathrooms, gyms, or travel kits.
description: A tall, white cylindrical lotion bottle with a screw-on cap, featuring the 'NEOSTRATA' brand and an orange label section. The design is clean and modern, with minimal graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'NEOSTRATA' brand name vertically, an orange 'DEFEND' label, and product details.
description_view_1: Side view with partial visibility of the orange label and some product text, mostly plain white surface.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal visible text, mostly plain white cylindrical surface and cap.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the 'NEOSTRATA' branding and a portion of the orange label, highlighting the bottle's smooth curvature.
